info.english_meaning: to dwell to reside to stay to invite
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAM na vidyate  tatra 10.180 gurda~ iti DAtoH 'pUrvaniketane' iti arTaH dattaH asti  parantu kezAYcana matena atra 'gurda~ pUrva~ niketane' iti paWitvA 'pUrva' iti pfTak DAtuH svIkriyate  saH eva atra nirdizwaH asti

participles.neuter: pUrvayAmbaBUvat, pUrvayAmbaBUvad, pUrvayAmAsivat, pUrvayAmAsivad, pUrvayAYcakfvat, pUrvayAYcakfvad
pupUrvayizAmbaBUvat, pupUrvayizAmbaBUvad, pupUrvayizAmAsivat, pupUrvayizAmAsivad, pupUrvayizAYcakfvat, pupUrvayizAYcakfvad
